title: ifloga spicata subsp. labillardierei
intro: Ifloga spicata subsp. labillardierei, also known as the prickly ifloga, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and stems containing compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ifloga spicata subsp. labillardierei include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to alleviate conditions such as arthritis and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for its potential medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
